title: GSK Ends Alector Partnership
headline: GSK terminated its partnership with Alector, clearing the lead selection for the day's major pharma news.

title: FDA Resumes Releasing Rejection Letters
headline: The FDA returned to publicly posting drug rejection letters after a months-long pause, releasing 14 new Complete Response Letters on July 10, 2026.
key_facts: 14 new CRLs posted July 10, 2026; pause began April 2026; CDER added 100+ employees in single quarter; recipients include Jiangsu Hengrui, Elevar Therapeutics, Ipsen

title: Hengrui/Elevar PD-1 Combo Rejected Third Time
headline: The FDA issued a third Complete Response Letter for camrelizumab/rivoceranib combination in first-line unresectable hepatocellular carcinoma due to manufacturing deficiencies.
key_facts: 3rd CRL in two years; first-line unresectable HCC; manufacturing site deficiencies cited

title: FDA Expands Padcev-Keytruda to More MIBC
headline: The FDA broadened the Padcev + Keytruda combination to additional muscle-invasive bladder cancer (MIBC) patient populations.
key_facts: Label expansion for muscle-invasive bladder cancer (MIBC); July 10, 2026

title: Sanofi Wins Subcutaneous Sarclisa Approval
headline: Sanofi secured FDA approval for a subcutaneous on-body injector version of Sarclisa following an earlier regulatory delay.
key_facts: On-body injector formulation approved July 10, 2026; prior FDA delay

title: Apnimed Files IPO Amid FDA Review
headline: Apnimed filed for an IPO while awaiting FDA decision on its sleep apnea drug candidate.
key_facts: IPO filing July 10, 2026; ticker APMD; sleep apnea indication; pending FDA review

title: Moderna Crashes 11-12% in Biotech Selloff
headline: Moderna fell 11-12% on July 10, 2026 amid a sector-wide biotech rout driven by profit-taking, not company-specific catalysts; JPMorgan analyst named MRNA a short.
key_facts: MRNA down 11% to $68.50; YTD +160%; JPMorgan analyst Jessica Fye (top 8%, 58% success rate) reaffirmed Sell, avg price target $46.64 (31% downside); consensus 1 Buy, 13 Holds, 2 Sells; Q1 2026 revenue $389M (beat +65%); mRNA-1010 PDUFA Aug 5, 2026; ImmunityBio down 8% to $8.16, Q1 revenue $44.21M (+168% YoY); Sarepta down 8% to $18.84; XBI ETF down 4%

title: Corcept PDUFA Decision Upcoming
headline: Corcept Therapeutics faces an FDA PDUFA decision on July 11, 2026 for a platinum-resistant ovarian cancer candidate.
key_facts: PDUFA July 11, 2026; platinum-resistant ovarian cancer indication

title: Foundayo Launch Remains Muted
headline: Eli Lilly's Foundayo (orforglipron), approved April 1, 2026, continues to show muted launch momentum.
key_facts: Foundayo approved April 1, 2026; launch described as 'muted' as of July 10, 2026

title: Roche Scraps Tominersen Development
headline: Roche discontinued development of tominersen, an Ionis-partnered Huntington's disease drug.
key_facts: Tominersen development halted; Ionis partnership affected; Huntington's disease indication

title: AstraZeneca/Ionis Heart Drug Fails
headline: AstraZeneca and Ionis Pharmaceuticals' cardiovascular drug candidate failed in development.
key_facts: Ionis partnership; cardiovascular indication; failure outcome

title: Vertex/Crinetics Large Partnership
headline: Vertex and Crinetics announced a major partnership deal valued at $10B.
key_facts: $10B deal value; Vertex and Crinetics partnership

title: Vera Therapeutics IgAN FDA Approval
headline: Vera Therapeutics secured FDA approval for an IgA nephropathy (IgAN) therapy, competing against Otsuka's offering.
key_facts: IgA nephropathy (IgAN) indication; FDA approval; competitive with Otsuka

title: Bayer/Apollo Strategic Equity Deal
headline: Bayer completed a €3B equity infusion with Apollo in a strategic partnership.
key_facts: €3B equity investment; Bayer and Apollo partnership
